name: Blackline
description: Action. A rooftop infiltration of Meridian Tower — the operative Kestrel against Warden, the security chief who has been waiting for her. Original content.
author: Genesis Infinity

effects.name: Grazed
effects.description: A round clipped home — bleeding and slowed.

effects.name: Pinned
effects.description: Suppressing fire keeps them from moving cleanly.

effects.name: Flashed
effects.description: Blinded and deafened by a flashbang — no guard at all.

items.name: Kevlar Vest
items.description: A low-profile ballistic vest worn under the suit.

items.name: Adrenaline Shot
items.description: A single-use auto-injector that dulls pain and closes ranks fast.
